results.query: My payment keeps getting delayed, is there something going on with the way you guys process payouts?
Is there a way to get my earnings out faster or more frequently than they are now?
My payment keeps getting declined and I don't know what's going on with my subscription
Is there a way to get my account working again if my payment method isn't going through
my customer is getting a refund but i'm still being charged a fee
is there a way to recoup the processing costs when i have to give a customer their money back
My payment keeps getting flagged and I don't know what's going on with it, can you help me figure out what's happening?
Is there a way to deal with those pesky transactions that customers are claiming they didn't make, I need to get this sorted out ASAP
My payment keeps failing and I'm trying to figure out if it's because I'm using a card from another country
Is there a way to use a credit card that's not from the US on your site
My customers keep getting charged but I don't see the payments in my account, can you help me figure out what's going on with recurring payments?
Is there a way to automatically bill my users on a monthly basis without having to manually send them invoices every time?
My payments keep failing during testing, is there a special key I should be using?
Is there a way to try out payments without actually charging my customers or myself?
My payments are going through but I'm not seeing the updates in my system, how can I trust that it's actually Stripe sending these notifications?
Is there a way to confirm that the requests I'm getting are legit and not some random spam, I've heard about security issues with third-party services before
My payment keeps failing because of tax issues, can you help me figure out what's going on with that?
Is there a way to automatically handle tax calculations for my transactions so I don't have to manually do it every time?

Is there a way to make sure my customers in other countries can pay with their own currency without me having to do any extra work on my end
My payment keeps getting flagged, what's going on behind the scenes to make sure it's really me making the purchase?
Is there a way to stop transactions from being declined due to suspected fraud, I feel like I'm getting locked out of my own account sometimes
My payment keeps failing and I don't know what's going on, can you help me figure it out?
Is there a way to get my account fully activated so I can start receiving payments already?
My payment keeps failing and I don't want to have to keep calling in to fix it, can I do something on my end to change my card info?
Is there a way to get ahold of my subscription details without having to go through support every time I want to know how much I'm being charged?
My payment keeps failing and I think I might not be getting the invoices, do you guys send those out automatically or do I need to do something?
Is there a way to get invoices sent directly to customers or do I have to manually attach them every time I send a payment request?
My payment keeps failing when I try to pay multiple sellers at once, is there something specific I need to set up to make it work?
Is there a way to divide a payment among several recipients, like when a customer buys from multiple vendors in a single transaction?
I'm trying to get a refund for a charge that didn't work out, but I'm not sure if it's still possible since it was a while ago.
Is there a way to reverse a transaction that's already settled, or am I out of luck at this point?
my payment keeps failing and i'm getting charged extra fees, what's going on with the charges for processing cards
is there a way to avoid super high fees when customers pay with their credit cards on my site

is there a way to make the payment page look like it's part of my website instead of some external thing
My payment keeps failing because I have to enter card details every time, is there a way to avoid this for repeat customers?
I'm trying to make recurring payments for my subscribers, can I store their card info so I don't have to hassle them every month?
